sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ خَالِدٌ عَمَلَهُ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Khalid počinje svoj posao u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid starts his work at eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: يُنَظِّمُ مَكْتَبَهُ وَيَكْتُبُ قَائِمَةً بِالْأَعْمَالِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ الْهَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Organizuje svoj sto i piše listu važnih dnevnih poslova.
sentences.translationEn: He organizes his desk and writes a list of important daily tasks.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ التَّرْكِيزَ عَلَى الْمَهَامِ الصَّعْبَةِ قَبْلَ مَوْعِدِ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Više voli da se fokusira na teške zadatke prije vremena za ručak.
sentences.translationEn: He prefers to focus on difficult tasks before lunch time.
